academicPlan.focus: SAS Core: Expos & Calc 135. Join Accounting Society.
Intro Financial & Managerial. Aim for Summer Leadership Programs (SLPs).
Intermediate I & II. Recruiting peaks in September for Big 4.

branding.advice: Mandatory for Rutgers. RSVP for 'Meet the Firms' here to get on recruiter lists.
Use Rutgers NetID for free LinkedIn Learning. Add 'Excel for Accountants' to your profile.
Look for free RBS headshot events in the 100 Rock atrium.

cpaTools.name: Becker
cpaTools.desc: The industry standard. Usually paid for by your firm once you sign an offer.

cpaTools.name: uWorld (Peter Olinto)
cpaTools.desc: Best video lectures. Peter Olinto is a fan-favorite at Rutgers!

cpaTools.name: Surgent
cpaTools.desc: Uses AI to identify your weak spots and reduce total study time.

clubs.name: Beta Alpha Psi (BAP)
clubs.desc: The Honor Society. Essential for networking with the Big 4.

clubs.name: Accounting Society
clubs.desc: Great for early-stage students to learn about the career.

clubs.name: TeamUP
clubs.desc: RBS flagship mentorship program connecting you to alumni.
